---
title: "ENVS-193DS_homework-03-DOC"
author: "Megan Zhao"
date: 5/28/26
format: pdf
editor: source
messages: false
warning: false
---

# Set Up

Packages

```{r}
#| label: packages

library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(janitor)
library(readxl)

```

Data: 

```{r}
#| label: data

kelp <- read.csv('temp-kelp.csv')

```

# Problem 1

## a.

[]

## b.

```{r}
#| label: test-1-visualization

```

## c.

### assumption checking 

```{r}
#| label: assumption-checking

```

[insert text here]

### test running

```{r}
#| label: test-running

```

## d.

[]

## e.

[]

## f.

```{r}
#| label: test-2-visualization

```

# Problem 2

## a.

```{r}
#| label: plot-1

```

```{r}
#| label: plot-2

```

## b.

[]

# Problem 3

## a.

[]

## b. 

[insert image]

## c.

[insert image]

## d. 

[]

## e.

[insert hyperlink]

# Problem 4

## a. 

[]

## b.

[]

## c.

[]

## d.

[]
